problem id: 8f7b37be
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00101000 -> 11111111
  00100100 -> 01111111
  00000111 -> 10011111
  00011011 -> 00011111
  01001101 -> 11011111
  11111100 -> 01111111
  11000111 -> 10011111
  11110110 -> 00111111

query: 10000111
predicted answer: 10011111
